article_meta.title: Air Force One returns to Washington area due to minor electrical issue, White House says 1 of 4 | President Donald Trump

reasoning: The source article is from the Associated Press and is already quite neutral/factual in tone. The model's summary faithfully reproduces the factual content without adding loaded language. The phrase 'out of an abundance of caution' is directly from the White House spokesperson's quote, which is appropriate to include. The summary is straightforward and neutral. The only minor issue is that 'sources_represented' lists only 'Associated Press' rather than identifying the White House/Karoline Leavitt as a perspective, but this is a minor structural issue rather than bias.

custom_reasoning.spin: No loaded verbs; uses 'returned,' 'identified,' 'decided' — all neutral.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All claims are directly from the article and attributed appropriately.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: No subjective judgments presented as fact.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Language is measured and clinical throughout.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or character judgments.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about motivations or intentions beyond what was stated.
custom_reasoning.slant: The article itself is straightforward news; the summary reflects this proportionally.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Minor: the summary doesn't omit any perspectives, though the source article is itself a simple factual report with essentially one perspective (White House statement).
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: The word 'minor' is used but this comes directly from the official statement and is appropriate.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: No disproportionate emphasis on negative elements.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No deference issues; straightforward reporting of official statements.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: The summary adopts the phrase 'out of an abundance of caution' from the White House spokesperson without explicit attribution in the summary text itself, but this is attributed in the key_facts. The source article was already neutral AP reporting, so there's minimal loaded framing to inherit.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: sources_represented lists only 'Associated Press' rather than identifying the White House/Karoline Leavitt as a distinct perspective source. This is a structural incompleteness but the article itself only presents one substantive perspective.
